# empty

**Type Property**

Returns the “empty” subscription.

## Declaration

```swift
static var empty: any Subscription { get }
```

## Discussion

Use the empty subscription when you need a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscription] that ignores requests and cancellation.
